meaning: n.炮,枪,<美>手枪,油门vi.用枪射击,用枪打猎,加大油门快速前进vt.向...开枪,开大(引擎、汽车)的油门
examples: She raised the gun and fired.
Kate grabbed for the robber's gun.
An M60 machine-gun operator rests for a moment with his heavy load of ammunition.
That's always going to be because folks once again, a snake-bitten gun-shy from the last time.
